policies.returnRefund:
All custom-printed items are non-refundable once production has begun. For defective prints, please notify us within 24 hours of receipt with photo documentation. We will remake the affected items at no additional cost.

Eligibility for refunds applies only to:
- Items with clear manufacturing defects
- Orders cancelled before production starts
- Incorrect items shipped due to our error
policies.productionLeadTime:
Standard production takes 3-5 business days after artwork approval.

Rush orders (50% surcharge) are completed within 24-48 hours.

Large orders (500+ items) may require additional 2-3 business days.

Lead time begins after downpayment is received and artwork is approved.
policies.dataPrivacy:
PIXS Printing Shop is committed to protecting your privacy.

Data Collection: We collect only necessary information for order processing and customer service.

Data Usage: Your information is used solely for order fulfillment and communication regarding your orders.

Data Protection: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information.

Your Rights: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at privacy@pixs.ph
